## *"ꪶ꠸ᧁꫝꪻᦓ ꪮꪀ, ᛕꫀꫀρ 'ꫀꪑ ꪊρ ꪮ᥅ ꠸'ꪑ ᧁꪮꪀꫀ!"*

](https://images-wixmp-ed30a86b8c4ca887773594c2.wixmp.com/f/e310b603-d6d3-40c4-9ef0-662bd9940140/dexq1qp-e8ee034c-9e91-43b9-9301-0239f7fc7862.png/v1/fill/w_1280,h_1456/fnaf_security_breach_sun_and_moon_by_drawingistoohard_dexq1qp-fullview.png?token=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..gsHSJ-gaZ6r7dj6fFKLnMQ0Fv1Nr4fEFN-yDLd4r8ZQ)

## ꪻꫝ꠸ᦓ ꠸ᦓ ꪖꪶꪶ ꪊꪀᠻ꠸ꪀ꠸ᦓꫝꫀᦔ!
